prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, NFLX has an annualized volatility of approximately 35-40%. For a 3-day period, this translates to roughly 2-3% daily standard deviation. The point estimate assumes no directional bias (random walk). Confidence intervals are calculated using standard normal distribution assumptions: 50% CI uses ±0.67σ, 80% CI uses ±1.28σ, and 90% CI uses ±1.645σ, where σ represents the 3-day price standard deviation of approximately $1.52.
